mapper.sql: id, case_number, real_name, gender, card_number, birthdate, age, age_type, home_address, visit_date, noon, deptment_id, employee_id, regist_level_id, settle_category_id, is_book, regist_method, regist_money, visit_state
mapper.select: SELECT FROM register WHERE card_number = CAST(#{patientId} AS VARCHAR) OR real_name = CAST(#{patientId} AS VARCHAR) ORDER BY visit_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET real_name = #{realName}, gender = #{gender}, card_number = #{cardNumber}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, age = #{age}, age_type = #{ageType}, home_address = #{homeAddress}, visit_date = #{visitDate}, noon = #{noon}, deptment_id = #{deptmentId}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, regist_level_id = #{registLevelId}, settle_category_id = #{settleCategoryId}, is_book = #{isBook}, regist_method = #{registMethod}, regist_money = #{registMoney}, visit_state = #{visitState} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET visit_state = #{visitState} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET visit_state = #{visitState} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE register SET visit_state = 4 WHERE id = #{id}
